message:
fix(rpc): convert fork_session to async and add inner session lock

Convert fork_session() from sync to async to properly handle the
Arc<Mutex<Session>> architecture:

Changes:
- Change function signature to async fn with Cx parameter
- Acquire inner session lock at function start
- Update all guard.session.* accesses to use inner_session.*
- Caller now awaits fork_session() result

This was the last sync function directly accessing session state
that needed conversion for the thread-safe session architecture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
